findings.note: DO-NOT-EDIT generated file (internal/cli/teach.go, learn-loop surface); needs generator-template fix

Richer override written to mcp-descriptions.json but mcp-sync refused with reprint-required (false-positive client-compat probe on a fresh v4.29.0 client that already has Client.Config/Client.NoCache); override applies on next successful sync/regen
findings.spec_source_material: spec.yaml resource university.endpoints.list: GET /community-list, description 'List universities/communities in Shodhganga', no parameters, response_format html with html_extract mode=links link_prefixes=[/handle/10603]. Returns the DSpace community list; each entry is a university/collection with a 10603/NNN handle.
findings.target_description: List every university and institutional collection (DSpace community) indexed in Shodhganga. Takes no parameters. Returns each community's display name and its handle id (the NNN in 10603/NNN). Use university_get with a handle to open a specific institution's page, or thesis_search / browse_list to find theses once you know the university you want.
findings.gap_analysis: target_description is already written to mcp-descriptions.json; the generator could compose this same text from the spec endpoint description + response html_extract shape at generation time (name + handle return clause) instead of emitting the bare summary. The blocker to applying the override is not the spec but mcp-sync's client-compatibility probe falsely reporting missing Client.Config/Client.NoCache on a client that has both as public fields; both are generator/binary retro candidates.
